query:
SELECT 
  status,
  entity_type,
  type,
  COUNT(*) as count,
  SUM(CAST(amount AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as total
FROM transactions
GROUP BY status, entity_type, type
ORDER BY status, entity_type, type;
